final_prompt.prompt:
Generate an original, non-infringing UI mockup for an e-commerce landing page hero section for a beauty brand.

Style/medium: clean, bright, airy, feminine UI mockup with floral accents and purple flowers
Composition: hero section with left column (text/badges), center (model), right column (products/stats), bottom benefit cards
Subject: beauty landing page for "LUMEA BEAUTY", featuring a young East Asian woman smiling and touching her cheek, holding a dropper bottle of moisturizing boost serum
Scene/backdrop: soft pink and white color palette, floral accents with purple flowers
Lighting/mood: soft lighting, bright and airy atmosphere
Color palette: soft pink, white, purple flowers, gold accents on stat cards
Materials/textures: pill-shaped badges with small icons, pink checkmarks, floating white rounded rectangles with gold accents, horizontal white rounded rectangles with icons
Text (verbatim): "LUMEA BEAUTY", "特徴", "成分", "お客様の声", "使い方", "FAQ", "今すぐ試す", "鏡を見るたび、うるおう透明感。", "乾燥・くすみが気になる肌に。美容成分を贅沢に配合した、毎日のための集中保湿美容液。", "敏感肌OK", "高保湿", "朝晩使える", "美容成分をしっかり届ける", "ハリ・ツヤのある印象へ", "続けやすいシンプルケア", "初回限定で試してみる >", "成分をチェック >", "送料無料 / 初回限定 / 定期縛りなし", "満足度 96%", "美容成分 5種配合", "愛用者 12,000人突破", "うるおい", "透明感", "使いやすさ"
Constraints: 5 navigation links, 3 feature badges, 3 bullet points with pink checkmarks, 2 CTA buttons, 3 stat cards, 3 benefit cards at bottom
Avoid:
